phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Tourist Pass is accepted here
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿aceptan el Pase Turístico de Ronda?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ah-sehp-TAHN el PAH-seh too-REE-stee-koh deh RON-dah?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: Yes, it is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Gothic cloister is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra el claustro gótico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh en-kwehn-TRAH el KLAWS-troh GOH-tee-koh?

likely_response.local: Tras el Patio de los Naranjos, a la
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS nah-RAHN-hohs AH LAH
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.

responses.english: At the back of the courtyard, on the right.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS nah-RAHN-hohs AH LAH
responses.local: Tras el Patio de los Naranjos, a la

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the current exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la exposición actual?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN ak-TWAHL?

likely_response.local: En la primera planta, sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: On the first floor, main hall.

responses.english: On the first floor, main hall.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: En la primera planta, sala principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Mudejar tower is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo llego a la torre mudéjar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KO-mo YE-go a la TO-rreh moo-DEH-har?

likely_response.local: Subiendo las escaleras, al final del pasillo.
likely_response.pronunciation: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: Going up the stairs, at the end of the hallway.

responses.english: Going up the stairs, at the end of the hallway.
responses.phonetic: soo-bee-EHN-doh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
responses.local: Subiendo las escaleras, al final del pasillo.
